common.typeHasNoSettings: This type has no settings available

actionsSettingGroup.exportDesc: Export these settings as JSON data and copy them to the clipboard.
actionsSettingGroup.importDesc: Import JSON data to overwrite the current settings.

importModal.title: Import settings
importModal.parsingError: Parsing error, check console for more details

actionsSettingGroup.resetDesc: Reset these settings to the default.

resetModal.title: Confirm reset
resetModal.desc: This will permanently reset these settings back to the default.

settings.appearanceDesc: Adjust the appearance of various different property types and other features.
settings.propertyLinkSyntaxDesc: The text to use to detect a property link when followed by a hashtag (#) within a wikilink.

formulaEditorModal.title: Edit formula
formulaEditorModal.itemNameDesc: The name of the formula. Use this name in bases to reference this formula.

appearanceSettingsModal.resetModalDesc: This will permanently reset the colors back to their default.

settings.formulaDesc: The formula used to calculate the value of this property. The formula will re-run and update the property's value if needed on vault startup and whenever a file is created, changed, or deleted.

settings.optionsTypeDesc: How the available options should be determined.
settings.manualRemoveAllModalDesc: This will permanently remove all currently configured options.
settings.manualCustomColorModalDesc: Select or enter any valid CSS background.
settings.formulaDesc: The formula should return a list of strings or a list of lists which may have up to three strings corresponding to the value, label, and background of the option.
settings.baseConfigDesc: The configuration for the inline base.
settings.baseLabelColDesc: The column name in the base to use to get the displayed label for each option. If not set, the file's short name is used.
settings.baseBackgroundColDesc: The column name in the base to use to get the background for each option. If not set, the file's path is used to pick a random color.

baseEditor.thisFileSettingDesc: The file to use as the current file for the base editor. For testing purposes only.

InvalidPluginSettingsModal.title: Better Properties: Invalid plugin settings
InvalidPluginSettingsModal.desc: The plugin ran into the following issues when reading its settings:
InvalidPluginSettingsModal.instruction: Please correct this immediately. Otherwise, your settings will be overwritten.

openRenamePropertyModal.title: Rename property
openRenamePropertyModal.changesListDesc: The following changes will be made:
openRenamePropertyModal.changesListItemOne: All notes containing the old name in their properties are updated to use the new name instead.
openRenamePropertyModal.changesListItemTwo: The assigned type of the new name is updated to match the old name's type, and then the old name's type is reset.
openRenamePropertyModal.changesListItemThree: The property settings saved for the old name will be transferred to the new name.
openRenamePropertyModal.willNotChangeDesc: This will not update any formulas, filters, or other references to the old name.
openRenamePropertyModal.overwriteDesc: If the new name is already used in the properties of your notes and/or has property settings set, it will be overwritten with the data from the old name.
openRenamePropertyModal.permanentDesc: This change is permanent and cannot be undone.
openRenamePropertyModal.oldPropertyDesc: The current name of the property to be renamed.
openRenamePropertyModal.newPropertyDesc: The new name to rename the property to.
